title: lepidium fraseri
intro: Lepidium fraseri, also known as Peppergrass, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lepidium fraseri include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. Lepidium fraseri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
